label: Generic cold email 1 (calibration weak)
emailBody:
Hi Raj,

I wanted to reach out about our gifting services. We offer corporate hampers. Would you like to schedule a 30-minute call? Looking forward to hearing from you.

label: Follow-up only email 2 (calibration weak)
emailBody:
Hi Raj,

Just following up on my last email. Did you get a chance to read it?
note: Weak on deliverability (follow-up-only copy); rubric may stay moderate

label: Personalized email 1 (calibration strong)
subjectA: Diwali gifting for Test Corp India
emailBody:
Hi Priya,

I noticed Test Corp India has been investing in employee engagement across Bangalore.

We help IT companies with premium Diwali gifting for teams of 500+. Would a 15-minute call next week work to explore options for your team?

No worries if the timing is off.

Best regards

label: Strong rewrite from cold-email-review skill
emailBody:
Hi Raj,

Acme's Bangalore campus expansion stood out as Diwali planning kicks off for IT teams in the city. We curate mithai and dry-fruit hampers for corporate teams. Open to a quick note on a few options?

No worries if timing is off.
